name: meeting-prep
description: Prepare a meeting brief with context, agenda, questions, and likely decisions.
instructions: Use any provided notes, files, names, company, or topic. Research missing public context when useful. Produce a meeting brief with background, agenda, stakeholder notes, key questions, risks, and desired outcomes.

examples.input: Prepare for a sales call with an EV charging startup
examples.output: A briefing with company context, agenda, and questions.

author: Neura
